LI Violations

Leanne Chan

Feb 6, 2020

library(tigris)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE) 
library(tidycensus)
library(viridis)
library(riem)
library(gridExtra)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(RSocrata)
library(gifski)
library(png)
library(ggsn)
library(gganimate)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(caret)
library(ckanr)
library(FNN)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(car) #test colinarity
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(gmodels)
library(MASS)
library(e1071)
library(Hmisc)
library(Boruta)
library(corrplot)
library(viridis)
library(stargazer)
library(tigris)
library(GoodmanKruskal)
library(spatstat)
library(riem)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(QuantPsyc)
library(lubridate)
library(jsonlite)
mapTheme <- function(base_size = 12) {
  theme(
    text = element_text( color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14,colour = "black"),
    plot.subtitle=element_text(face="italic"),
    plot.caption=element_text(hjust=0),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_blank(),axis.title = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, size=2)
  )
}

# city limits
philly <- 
  st_read("http://data.phl.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/405ec3da942d4e20869d4e1449a2be48_0.geojson")%>%
  st_transform(crs=2272)

fishnet <- 
  st_make_grid(philly, cellsize = 800) %>%
  st_sf()

# clip the fishnet by the boundary
fishnet <- 
  fishnet[philly,] %>%
  mutate(uniqueID = rownames(.)) %>%
  dplyr::select(uniqueID)

# load the fire data
fire_excel<-read_excel('C:/Users/leann/OneDrive/Desktop/MUSA 800/Data/2015 to 2019 fires for u of pa report run 1620.xlsx')

fire.sf <- 
  fire_excel%>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326, agr = "constant") %>%
  st_set_crs(4326) %>%
  st_transform(2272)

fire.sf <- 
  st_intersection(fire.sf, philly)

fire_fishnet <- 
  fire.sf %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))


#Map the fire fishnet map (2015-2019)
fire<-ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = fire_fishnet, aes(fill = count), color=NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "A", direction=-1) +
  labs(title = "Count of fire incidents for the fishnet 2015-2019") +
  mapTheme()

#   mapTheme()

Are L&I Violations related to Fires?

Focusing on 3 currently: Unsafe Strucutres, Lacking Smoke Alarms, Uncertified Fire Extinguishers. Will add more and filter to 2015-2019 dates to match with Fire Data.

1. Kernel Density of Unsafe Structures 2015 - 2019

unsafe_structure_20152019<-fromJSON("https://phl.carto.com/api/v2/sql?q=SELECT%20*%20FROM%20li_violations%20WHERE%20(violationtype%20=%20%27PM15-108.1%27)%20AND%20(violationdate%20%3E=%20%272015-01-01%27)")

unsafeDF_1519<- 
  as.data.frame(unsafe_structure_20152019$rows) %>%
  dplyr::select(censustract,violationdate,violationdescription, status, casestatus, casepriority, geocode_x,geocode_y) %>%
  mutate('Year' = year(ymd_hms(violationdate)))%>%
  na.omit(., cols=c("geocode_x", "geocode_y"))%>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("geocode_x", "geocode_y"), crs = 2272) %>%
  mutate(
    X = st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    Y = st_coordinates(.)[,2])

Structure2015_points <- unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2015,]
Structure2015_fishnet<-unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2015,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

# get kernel density
Structure2015_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(Structure2015_points), W = st_bbox(Structure2015_fishnet))
Structure2015_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(Structure2015_ppp, 1000)
Structure2015_Plot<-as.data.frame(Structure2015_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2015) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2016 
Structure2016_points <- unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2016,]
Structure2016_fishnet<-unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2016,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))
Structure2016_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(Structure2016_points), W = st_bbox(Structure2016_fishnet))
Structure2016_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(Structure2016_ppp, 1000)
Structure2016_Plot<-as.data.frame(Structure2016_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2016) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2017

Structure2017_fishnet<-unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2017,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

Structure2017_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(Structure2017_points), W = st_bbox(Structure2017_fishnet))
Structure2017_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(Structure2017_ppp, 1000)
Structure2017_Plot<-as.data.frame(Structure2017_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +

Structure2018_fishnet<-unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2018,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),

# get kernel density
Structure2018_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(Structure2018_points), W = st_bbox(Structure2018_fishnet))

Structure2018_Plot<-as.data.frame(Structure2018_KD) %>% #2015

Structure2019_fishnet<-unsafeDF_1519[unsafeDF_1519$Year == 2019,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

Structure2019_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(Structure2019_ppp, 1000)

  labs(title = 2019) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()


grid.arrange(Structure2015_Plot, Structure2016_Plot, Structure2017_Plot, Structure2018_Plot, Structure2019_Plot, ncol=3, top="KD of Unsafe Structures code=PM15-108.1")

How does this compare to the kernel density of fires?

### THIS IS ALREADY RUN ABOVE IN MARKDOWN

#Map the fire fishnet map (2015-2019) (changed the color direction)
fire<-ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = fire_fishnet, aes(fill = count), color=NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option = "A", direction=-1) +
  labs(title = "Count of fire incidents for the fishnet 2015-2019") +
  mapTheme()
#Standarize date
fire.sf <- 
  fire.sf %>%
  mutate(date=dmy(alm_date),
         Year=year(date))
fire2015<-
  fire.sf %>%
  filter(Year == 2015)

# join fire data to the fishnet
fire2015_fishnet <- 
  fire2015 %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

#2016
fire2016<-
  fire.sf %>%
  filter(Year == 2016)
# join fire data to the fishnet
fire2016_fishnet <- 
  fire2016 %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

#2017
fire2017<-
  fire.sf %>%
  filter(Year == 2017)
# join fire data to the fishnet
fire2017_fishnet <- 
  fire2017 %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

#2018
fire2018<-
  fire.sf %>%
  filter(Year == 2018)
# join fire data to the fishnet
fire2018_fishnet <- 
  fire2018 %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))
#2019
fire2019<-
  fire.sf %>%
  filter(Year == 2019)

# join fire data to the fishnet
fire2019_fishnet <- 
  fire2019 %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

#By each year
fire_ppp_2015 <- as.ppp(st_coordinates(fire2015), W = st_bbox(fire2015_fishnet))
fire_KD_2015 <- spatstat::density.ppp(fire_ppp_2015, 1000)

fire_ppp_2016 <- as.ppp(st_coordinates(fire2016), W = st_bbox(fire2016_fishnet))
fire_KD_2016 <- spatstat::density.ppp(fire_ppp_2016, 1000)

fire_ppp_2017 <- as.ppp(st_coordinates(fire2017), W = st_bbox(fire2017_fishnet))
fire_KD_2017<- spatstat::density.ppp(fire_ppp_2017, 1000)

fire_ppp_2018 <- as.ppp(st_coordinates(fire2018), W = st_bbox(fire2018_fishnet))
fire_KD_2018 <- spatstat::density.ppp(fire_ppp_2018, 1000)

fire_ppp_2019 <- as.ppp(st_coordinates(fire2019), W = st_bbox(fire2019_fishnet))
fire_KD_2019 <- spatstat::density.ppp(fire_ppp_2019, 1000)
# fires 

fire_KD_2015_F<-as.data.frame(fire_KD_2015) %>% 
    st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fire2015_fishnet)) %>%
    aggregate(.,fire2015_fishnet, mean)%>%
    rename('FireKD' = 'value')

fire_KD_2016_F<-as.data.frame(fire_KD_2016) %>% 
    st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fire2016_fishnet)) %>%
    aggregate(.,fire2016_fishnet, mean)%>%
    rename('FireKD' = 'value')

fire_KD_2017_F<-as.data.frame(fire_KD_2017) %>% 
    st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fire2017_fishnet)) %>%
    aggregate(.,fire2017_fishnet, mean)%>%
    rename('FireKD' = 'value')

fire_KD_2018_F<-as.data.frame(fire_KD_2018) %>% 
    st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fire2018_fishnet)) %>%
    aggregate(.,fire2018_fishnet, mean)%>%
    rename('FireKD' = 'value')

fire_KD_2019_F<-as.data.frame(fire_KD_2019) %>% 
    st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fire2019_fishnet)) %>%
    aggregate(.,fire2019_fishnet, mean)%>%
    rename('FireKD' = 'value')
nn_function <- function(measureFrom,measureTo,k) {
  measureFrom_Matrix <-
    as.matrix(measureFrom)
  measureTo_Matrix <-
    as.matrix(measureTo)
  nn <-   
    get.knnx(measureTo, measureFrom, k)$nn.dist
    output <-
      as.data.frame(nn) %>%
      rownames_to_column(var = "thisPoint") %>%
      gather(points, point_distance, V1:ncol(.)) %>%
      arrange(as.numeric(thisPoint)) %>%
      group_by(thisPoint) %>%
      summarise(pointDistance = mean(point_distance)) %>%
      arrange(as.numeric(thisPoint)) %>% 
      dplyr::select(-thisPoint) %>%
      pull()
  
  return(output)  
}
# structure violations 
Structure2015_KD_F<-as.data.frame(Structure2015_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('StructureKD' = 'value')

Structure2016_KD_F<-as.data.frame(Structure2016_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('StructureKD' = 'value')

Structure2017_KD_F<-as.data.frame(Structure2017_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('StructureKD' = 'value')

Structure2018_KD_F<-as.data.frame(Structure2018_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('StructureKD' = 'value')

Structure2019_KD_F<-as.data.frame(Structure2019_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('StructureKD' = 'value')

## KD to KD with CENTROIDS OF FISHNET GRID

# 2015
Structures_Fires_2015<-st_join(fire_KD_2015_F, Structure2015_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(Structures_Fires_2015)
KDPlot_2015<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2015, aes(x=StructureKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2015")

# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
Structures_Fires_2015$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(Structures_Fires_2015), st_coordinates(Structure2015_points), 1)
distPlot_2015<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2015, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2016
Structures_Fires_2016<-st_join(fire_KD_2016_F, Structure2016_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(Structures_Fires_2016)
KDPlot_2016<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2016, aes(x=StructureKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2016")

# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
Structures_Fires_2016$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(Structures_Fires_2016), st_coordinates(Structure2016_points), 1)
distPlot_2016<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2016, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2017
Structures_Fires_2017<-st_join(fire_KD_2017_F, Structure2017_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(Structures_Fires_2017)
KDPlot_2017<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2017, aes(x=StructureKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2017")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
Structures_Fires_2017$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(Structures_Fires_2017), st_coordinates(Structure2017_points), 1)
distPlot_2017<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2017, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2018
Structures_Fires_2018<-st_join(fire_KD_2018_F, Structure2018_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(Structures_Fires_2018)
KDPlot_2018<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2018, aes(x=StructureKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2018")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
Structures_Fires_2018$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(Structures_Fires_2018), st_coordinates(Structure2018_points), 1)
distPlot_2018<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2018, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2019 
Structures_Fires_2019<-st_join(fire_KD_2019_F, Structure2019_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(Structures_Fires_2019)
KDPlot_2019<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2019, aes(x=StructureKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2019")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
Structures_Fires_2019$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(Structures_Fires_2019), st_coordinates(Structure2019_points), 1)
distPlot_2019<-ggplot(Structures_Fires_2019, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)
grid.arrange(KDPlot_2015, distPlot_2015,
             KDPlot_2016, distPlot_2016,
             KDPlot_2017, distPlot_2017,
             KDPlot_2018, distPlot_2018,
             KDPlot_2019, distPlot_2019, ncol=2,
             top='Relationship between fire density and Unsafe Buildings')

2. Kernel Density of Units lacking Smoke Alarms 2015 - 2019

# lack smoke alarm 
lack_smokeAlarm<- fromJSON("https://phl.carto.com/api/v2/sql?q=SELECT%20*%20FROM%20li_violations%20WHERE%20(violationtype%20=%20%27FC-907.3/20%27)%20AND%20(violationdate%20%3E=%20%272015-01-01%27)")

lack_smokeAlarm_DF<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm$rows) %>%
  dplyr::select(censustract,violationdate,violationdescription, status, casestatus, casepriority, geocode_x,geocode_y)%>%
  mutate('Year' = year(ymd_hms(violationdate)))%>%
  na.omit(., cols=c("geocode_x", "geocode_y"))%>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("geocode_x", "geocode_y"), crs = 2272) %>%
  mutate(
    X = st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    Y = st_coordinates(.)[,2])

# plots<-vector()
# 
#

#   points <- lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == year,]

#     dplyr::select() %>% 
#     mutate(count = 1) %>% 
#     aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
#     mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
#            uniqueID = rownames(.),
#            cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))
#   
#   #Fishney grid counts 
#   
#   #plotName <-paste(year, 'unsafeStructure_plot', sep="_")
#  
#   # currentPlot<-ggplot() +
#   #   geom_sf(data = current, aes(fill = count),colour=NA) +
#   #   scale_fill_viridis(direction=-1,option="A") +
#   #   labs(title= titleYR,
#   #        subtitle=paste("Source: L&I Violations", sep="; ")) +
#   #   mapTheme()
#   # print(currentPlot)
#   
#   # get kernel density
#   ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(points), W = st_bbox(fishnet))
#   KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(ppp, 1000)
#   titleYR<-paste(year, "KD of Lack Smoke Alarm ALL, code=FC-907.3/20", sep=" ")
#   
#   currentPlot<-as.data.frame(KD) %>% #2015
#     st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
#     aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
#     ggplot() +
#     geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
#     labs(title = titleYR) +
#     scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
#     mapTheme()
#   
#   print(currentPlot)
#   
  #append(plots, currentPlot, after = length(plots))
  # QUESTION: HOW TO STORE PLOTS SO I CAN LATER USE IN GRID.ARRANGE? 
#}

lack_smokeAlarm2015_points <- lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2015,]
lack_smokeAlarm2015_fishnet<-lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2015,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

# get kernel density
lack_smokeAlarm2015_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2015_points), W = st_bbox(lack_smokeAlarm2015_fishnet))
lack_smokeAlarm2015_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(lack_smokeAlarm2015_ppp, 1000)
lack_smokeAlarm2015_Plot<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2015_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2015) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2016 
lack_smokeAlarm2016_points <- lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2016,]
lack_smokeAlarm2016_fishnet<-lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2016,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))
lack_smokeAlarm2016_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2016_points), W = st_bbox(lack_smokeAlarm2016_fishnet))
lack_smokeAlarm2016_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(lack_smokeAlarm2016_ppp, 1000)
lack_smokeAlarm2016_Plot<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2016_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2016) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2017
lack_smokeAlarm2017_points <- lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2017,]
lack_smokeAlarm2017_fishnet<-lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2017,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

lack_smokeAlarm2017_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2017_points), W = st_bbox(lack_smokeAlarm2017_fishnet))
lack_smokeAlarm2017_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(lack_smokeAlarm2017_ppp, 1000)
lack_smokeAlarm2017_Plot<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2017_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2017) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2018
lack_smokeAlarm2018_points <- lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2018,]
lack_smokeAlarm2018_fishnet<-lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2018,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

# get kernel density
lack_smokeAlarm2018_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2018_points), W = st_bbox(lack_smokeAlarm2018_fishnet))
lack_smokeAlarm2018_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(lack_smokeAlarm2018_ppp, 1000)
lack_smokeAlarm2018_Plot<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2018_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2018) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()


# 2019
lack_smokeAlarm2019_points <- lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2019,]
lack_smokeAlarm2019_fishnet<-lack_smokeAlarm_DF[lack_smokeAlarm_DF$Year == 2019,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

lack_smokeAlarm2019_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2019_points), W = st_bbox(lack_smokeAlarm2019_fishnet))
lack_smokeAlarm2019_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(lack_smokeAlarm2019_ppp, 1000)
lack_smokeAlarm2019_Plot<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2019_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2019) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()


grid.arrange(lack_smokeAlarm2015_Plot, lack_smokeAlarm2016_Plot, lack_smokeAlarm2017_Plot, lack_smokeAlarm2018_Plot, lack_smokeAlarm2019_Plot, ncol=3, top="KD of lack_smokeAlarms code=PM15-108.1")

#### Relation to kernel density of fires

# structure violations 
lack_smokeAlarm2015_KD_F<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2015_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('lack_smokeAlarmKD' = 'value')

lack_smokeAlarm2016_KD_F<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2016_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('lack_smokeAlarmKD' = 'value')

lack_smokeAlarm2017_KD_F<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2017_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('lack_smokeAlarmKD' = 'value')

lack_smokeAlarm2018_KD_F<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2018_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('lack_smokeAlarmKD' = 'value')

lack_smokeAlarm2019_KD_F<-as.data.frame(lack_smokeAlarm2019_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('lack_smokeAlarmKD' = 'value')

## KD to KD with CENTROIDS OF FISHNET GRID

# 2015
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2015<-st_join(fire_KD_2015_F, lack_smokeAlarm2015_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2015)
KDPlot_2015_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2015, aes(x=lack_smokeAlarmKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2015")

# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2015$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2015), st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2015_points), 1)
distPlot_2015_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2015, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2016
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2016<-st_join(fire_KD_2016_F, lack_smokeAlarm2016_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2016)
KDPlot_2016_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2016, aes(x=lack_smokeAlarmKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2016")

# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2016$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2016), st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2016_points), 1)
distPlot_2016_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2016, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2017
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2017<-st_join(fire_KD_2017_F, lack_smokeAlarm2017_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2017)
KDPlot_2017_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2017, aes(x=lack_smokeAlarmKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2017")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2017$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2017), st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2017_points), 1)
distPlot_2017_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2017, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2018
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2018<-st_join(fire_KD_2018_F, lack_smokeAlarm2018_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2018)
KDPlot_2018_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2018, aes(x=lack_smokeAlarmKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2018")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2018$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2018), st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2018_points), 1)
distPlot_2018_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2018, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2019 
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2019<-st_join(fire_KD_2019_F, lack_smokeAlarm2019_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2019)
KDPlot_2019_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2019, aes(x=lack_smokeAlarmKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2019")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2019$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2019), st_coordinates(lack_smokeAlarm2019_points), 1)
distPlot_2019_ALM<-ggplot(lack_smokeAlarms_Fires_2019, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)
grid.arrange(KDPlot_2015_ALM, distPlot_2015_ALM,
             KDPlot_2016_ALM, distPlot_2016_ALM,
             KDPlot_2017_ALM, distPlot_2017_ALM,
             KDPlot_2018_ALM, distPlot_2018_ALM,
             KDPlot_2019_ALM, distPlot_2019_ALM, ncol=2,
             top='Relationship between fire density and Lack of Smoke Alarms ')

3. Kernel Density of Units with Uncertified Fire Extinguishers

# Fire extinguisher not certifies 
fire_ext_notcertified<- fromJSON("https://phl.carto.com/api/v2/sql?q=SELECT%20*%20FROM%20li_violations%20WHERE%20(violationtype%20=%20%27FC-906.2/2%27)%20AND%20(violationdate%20%3E=%20%272015-01-01%27)")

fire_ext_notcertified_DF<-as.data.frame(fire_ext_notcertified$rows) %>%
  dplyr::select(censustract,violationdate,violationdescription, status, casestatus,casepriority, geocode_x,geocode_y) %>%
  na.omit(., cols=c("geocode_x", "geocode_y"))%>%
  mutate('Year' = year(ymd_hms(violationdate)))%>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("geocode_x", "geocode_y"), crs = 2272) %>%
  mutate(
    X = st_coordinates(.)[,1],
    Y = st_coordinates(.)[,2])

# #              aes(x=X,y=Y), size=0.1, color='red') +

# # fireExtNotCertified_fishnet <- 
# #   fire_ext_notcertified_DF %>% 
# #   dplyr::select() %>% 
# #   mutate(count = 1) %>% 
# #   aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
# #   mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),

# # fireExt<-ggplot() +
# #   geom_sf(data = fireExtNotCertified_fishnet, aes(fill = count),colour=NA) +
# #   scale_fill_viridis(option="A", direction=-1) +

# #        subtitle=paste("Source: L&I Violations", sep="; "))+
# #   mapTheme()

extinguisher2015_points <- fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2015,]
extinguisher2015_fishnet<-fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2015,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

# get kernel density
extinguisher2015_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(extinguisher2015_points), W = st_bbox(extinguisher2015_fishnet))
extinguisher2015_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(extinguisher2015_ppp, 1000)
extinguisher2015_Plot<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2015_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2015) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2016 
extinguisher2016_points <-fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2016,]
extinguisher2016_fishnet<-fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2016,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))
extinguisher2016_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(extinguisher2016_points), W = st_bbox(extinguisher2016_fishnet))
extinguisher2016_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(extinguisher2016_ppp, 1000)
extinguisher2016_Plot<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2016_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2016) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2017
extinguisher2017_points <- fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2017,]
extinguisher2017_fishnet<-fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2017,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

extinguisher2017_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(extinguisher2017_points), W = st_bbox(extinguisher2017_fishnet))
extinguisher2017_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(extinguisher2017_ppp, 1000)
extinguisher2017_Plot<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2017_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2017) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()

# 2018
extinguisher2018_points <- fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2018,]
extinguisher2018_fishnet<-fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2018,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

# get kernel density
extinguisher2018_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(extinguisher2018_points), W = st_bbox(extinguisher2018_fishnet))
extinguisher2018_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(extinguisher2018_ppp, 1000)
extinguisher2018_Plot<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2018_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2018) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()


# 2019
extinguisher2019_points <- fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2019,]
extinguisher2019_fishnet<-fire_ext_notcertified_DF[fire_ext_notcertified_DF$Year == 2019,] %>% 
  dplyr::select() %>% 
  mutate(count = 1) %>% 
  aggregate(., fishnet, sum) %>%
  mutate(count = ifelse(is.na(count), 0, count),
         uniqueID = rownames(.),
         cvID = sample(round(nrow(fishnet) / 24), size=nrow(fishnet), replace = TRUE))

extinguisher2019_ppp<- as.ppp(st_coordinates(extinguisher2019_points), W = st_bbox(extinguisher2019_fishnet))
extinguisher2019_KD <- spatstat::density.ppp(extinguisher2019_ppp, 1000)
extinguisher2019_Plot<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2019_KD) %>% #2015
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  ggplot() +
  geom_sf(aes(fill=value),colour=NA) +
  labs(title = 2019) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno') +
  mapTheme()


grid.arrange(extinguisher2015_Plot, extinguisher2016_Plot, extinguisher2017_Plot, extinguisher2018_Plot, extinguisher2019_Plot, ncol=3, top="KD of Unsafe extinguishers code=PM15-108.1")

#### Relation to Kernel Density of Fires

# structure violations 
extinguisher2015_KD_F<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2015_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('extinguisherKD' = 'value')

extinguisher2016_KD_F<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2016_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('extinguisherKD' = 'value')

extinguisher2017_KD_F<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2017_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('extinguisherKD' = 'value')

extinguisher2018_KD_F<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2018_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('extinguisherKD' = 'value')

extinguisher2019_KD_F<-as.data.frame(extinguisher2019_KD) %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("x", "y"), crs = st_crs(fishnet)) %>%
  aggregate(.,fishnet, mean) %>%
  rename('extinguisherKD' = 'value')

## KD to KD with CENTROIDS OF FISHNET GRID

# 2015
extinguishers_Fires_2015<-st_join(fire_KD_2015_F, extinguisher2015_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(extinguishers_Fires_2015)
KDPlot_2015extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2015, aes(x=extinguisherKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2015")

# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
extinguishers_Fires_2015$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(extinguishers_Fires_2015), st_coordinates(extinguisher2015_points), 1)
distPlot_2015extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2015, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2016
extinguishers_Fires_2016<-st_join(fire_KD_2016_F, extinguisher2016_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(extinguishers_Fires_2016)
KDPlot_2016extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2016, aes(x=extinguisherKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2016")

# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
extinguishers_Fires_2016$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(extinguishers_Fires_2016), st_coordinates(extinguisher2016_points), 1)
distPlot_2016extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2016, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2017
extinguishers_Fires_2017<-st_join(fire_KD_2017_F, extinguisher2017_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(extinguishers_Fires_2017)
KDPlot_2017extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2017, aes(x=extinguisherKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2017")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
extinguishers_Fires_2017$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(extinguishers_Fires_2017), st_coordinates(extinguisher2017_points), 1)
distPlot_2017extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2017, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2018
extinguishers_Fires_2018<-st_join(fire_KD_2018_F, extinguisher2018_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(extinguishers_Fires_2018)
KDPlot_2018extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2018, aes(x=extinguisherKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2018")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
extinguishers_Fires_2018$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(extinguishers_Fires_2018), st_coordinates(extinguisher2018_points), 1)
distPlot_2018extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2018, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)

# 2019 
extinguishers_Fires_2019<-st_join(fire_KD_2019_F, extinguisher2019_KD_F)%>%
  st_centroid(extinguishers_Fires_2019)
KDPlot_2019extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2019, aes(x=extinguisherKD, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)+
  labs(title="2019")
# KD fires to distance to violations from center of fishnet ggrid
extinguishers_Fires_2019$violation_nn1 =
    nn_function(st_coordinates(extinguishers_Fires_2019), st_coordinates(extinguisher2019_points), 1)
distPlot_2019extinguisher<-ggplot(extinguishers_Fires_2019, aes(x=violation_nn1, y=FireKD)) +
  geom_point(size=2, shape=19)
grid.arrange(KDPlot_2015extinguisher, distPlot_2015extinguisher,
             KDPlot_2016extinguisher, distPlot_2016extinguisher,
             KDPlot_2017extinguisher, distPlot_2017extinguisher,
             KDPlot_2018extinguisher, distPlot_2018extinguisher,
             KDPlot_2019extinguisher, distPlot_2019extinguisher, ncol=2,
             top='Relationship between fire density and Fire Extinguisher not Ceritifed')
